des: Thomas Saggese singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyrone Taylor. Nolan Gorman to 2nd.
Thomas Saggese flies out to right fielder Carson Benge.
Thomas Saggese walks. Masyn Winn to 2nd.

Thomas Saggese pops out to third baseman Junior Caminero in foul territory.
